coverage.note: This story's DoD does not require coverage deltas (migration-only scope). Invariant test KnowledgeMigrationInvariantTest validates dual-source absence; coverage gate applies to KnowledgeAssembler (story-0051-0001, already 97.8% line / 100% branch) and to KP-consuming code retrofitted in stories 0051-0003/0006.

skippedBreakdown.note: 10 test methods are @Disabled with explicit story-0051-0003 reference because they assert the OLD KP frontmatter contract (user-invocable: false, allowed-tools, argument-hint) that RULE-051-07 explicitly forbids in the new knowledge format. These tests will be rewritten or removed when consumers are retrofitted.

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.scenario: migração de KP sem references (happy path)
acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: Examples verified: coding-standards.md, testing.md, architecture.md exist at new location with cleaned frontmatter; old paths removed
Examples verified: security/ patterns-outbox/ have index.md + sibling .md files at new location; old paths removed
KnowledgeMigrationInvariantTest.oldKnowledgePacksDir_doesNotExist enforces absence of old directory; fails with clear message if dual source detected

checks: SkillsCopyHelper methods use consistent KNOWLEDGE_DIR constant
copyKnowledgePack / copyStackPatterns / copyInfraPatterns share copyNonIndexItems helper (fan-in DRY)
All 3 paths accept either simple (knowledge/{name}.md) or complex (knowledge/{name}/index.md) source shape

smokeResult.note: mvn process-resources + full mvn test (BUILD SUCCESS). Ten KP profiles regenerated via GoldenFileRegenerator with no diff vs source.
